items.title: WinPE speeds Windows driver fuzzing
items.oneliner: Boot a 200MB stateless Windows harness for unsigned driver testing, E2E runs, and kernel fuzzing without full VMs.

items.title: Build a passive Ethernet tap
items.oneliner: Step-by-step guide to sniff 100 Mbps Ethernet with cheap parts and receive-only monitor ports that cannot disrupt traffic.

items.title: JavaScript ECS benchmark with memory data
items.oneliner: Benchmarks ECS versus OOP in JavaScript on Apple M4 Pro, showing memory-locality tradeoffs for game loops.

items.title: Wordgard is a new rich text core
items.oneliner: MIT-licensed editor engine from ProseMirror's author offers a fresh architecture for building custom rich text tooling.

items.title: Senior SWE-Bench tests coding agents
items.oneliner: Open benchmark evaluates agents on senior-level debugging tasks that require runtime investigation, not just patch generation.

items.title: CursorBench compares coding model performance
items.oneliner: Interactive eval suite helps teams compare coding assistant quality and responsiveness before standardizing on a model.

items.title: Build your own robot vacuum
items.oneliner: Open-source Raspberry Pi and ROS 2 vacuum includes BOM, build docs, and local-first control without cloud lock-in.

items.title: Google open sourced ZKP libraries
items.oneliner: Privacy-preserving identity libraries let developers verify age or credentials without exposing the underlying personal data.

items.title: Typed localStorage object restoration pattern
items.oneliner: Practical TypeScript pattern restores class instances from localStorage instead of returning methodless JSON objects.

items.title: Better jj aliases for daily use
items.oneliner: Hands-on jj alias patterns fix nested command pain and make the VCS CLI safer to use every day.
